title: senecio helenitis var. discoideus
intro: Senecio helenitis var. discoideus, also known as the 'discoideus' or 'ragwort', is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Mexico and Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in digestion. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of Senecio helenitis var. discoideus are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
